evals.prompt:
네이버 웹툰 백엔드 엔지니어에 지원하려고 해.

[채용 공고]
백엔드 엔지니어
- Java/Kotlin 기반 서버 개발 3년 이상
- Spring Boot, Spring MVC 경험
- RDBMS 설계 및 운영 경험
- 대규모 트래픽 처리 경험 우대
- 웹툰 서비스 도메인 이해도 우대
evals.expected_output: Extracts company (naver-webtoon), date (today YYMMDD), checks out main first, creates branch, invokes review-resume with JD context, follows structured 7-step workflow including push & cleanup
expectations: Company name correctly extracted as 'naver-webtoon' in lowercase kebab-case
Branch follows {company}/{YYMMDD} pattern (e.g. naver-webtoon/260323)
Switches to main branch before creating the new branch (git checkout main)
References review-resume skill invocation for resume tailoring
Notes correct bun run pdf {branch} command for PDF generation
Checks or mentions config.yaml for PDF output configuration
Pushes branch to origin after PDF delivery (git push origin {branch})
Deletes local branch after successful push (git branch -D {branch})
Follows all 7 steps in documented order
Outputs [Step N/7: ...] completion markers for each step
Outputs the Resume Apply Completion checklist at the end
Does not fabricate experience or metrics
Invokes Skill(humanizer) in audit mode during Phase 9 AI Tone Audit — manual scanning does NOT count

evals.prompt:
라인망가에 지원 준비 해야돼. JD는 이거야:

Line Manga - Server Engineer

- Kotlin/Java 기반 서버 개발
- 만화 뷰어 및 스토어 API 개발
- 결제/정산 시스템 운영

- 서버 개발 경력 5년 이상
- Kotlin 또는 Java 능숙
- Spring Framework 활용 경험
evals.expected_output: Extracts company (linemanga), date (today YYMMDD), checks out main first, creates branch, invokes review-resume with JD context, follows structured 7-step workflow including push & cleanup
expectations: Company name correctly extracted as 'linemanga' in lowercase (no hyphen — single compound name)
Branch follows {company}/{YYMMDD} pattern
Switches to main branch before creating the new branch
Checks other branches' _config.yml for existing patterns before review-resume
References review-resume skill invocation
Notes correct bun run pdf {branch} command
Handles config.yaml check for PDF output configuration
Pushes branch to origin after PDF delivery
Deletes local branch after successful push
Follows all 7 steps in documented order
Outputs [Step N/7: ...] completion markers for each step
Outputs the Resume Apply Completion checklist at the end
Does not fabricate experience or metrics
Invokes Skill(humanizer) in audit mode during Phase 9 AI Tone Audit — manual scanning does NOT count

evals.prompt:
쿠팡 백엔드 엔지니어에 지원하려고 해.

[채용 공고]
Backend Engineer
주요업무:
- Java/Kotlin 기반 대규모 이커머스 서버 개발
- 주문/결제/물류 시스템 설계 및 운영
- MSA 기반 서비스 개발
자격요건:
- 서버 개발 경력 3년 이상
- Spring Boot, JPA 활용 경험
- Redis, Kafka 경험 우대
evals.expected_output: Extracts company (coupang), date (today YYMMDD), checks out main first, creates branch, checks other branches for reference patterns, invokes review-resume with JD context, resolves pdf_output_dir_rule, extracts {position} from JD title, pushes to origin and cleans up local branch
expectations: Company name correctly extracted as 'coupang' in lowercase
Branch follows {company}/{YYMMDD} pattern
Switches to main branch before creating the new branch
Checks other branches' _config.yml for existing patterns before review-resume
References review-resume skill invocation
Extracts position title from JD (Backend Engineer) for {position} variable
Resolves pdf_output_dir_rule by interpreting natural language rule, not using hardcoded path
Pushes branch to origin after PDF delivery
Deletes local branch after successful push (git branch -D)
If push fails, does NOT delete local branch
Follows all 7 steps in documented order
Outputs [Step N/7: ...] completion markers for each step
Outputs the Resume Apply Completion checklist at the end
Does not fabricate experience or metrics
Invokes Skill(humanizer) in audit mode during Phase 9 AI Tone Audit — manual scanning does NOT count

evals.prompt: 이력서 지원 준비 좀 해야하는데, JD는 아직 안 골랐어. 뭐 넣을지 같이 좀 봐줘.
evals.expected_output: Enters JD Discovery path (1-B). Checks config.yaml for jd_source. If missing, runs first-run interview asking about JD storage location and preferences. After config is set, browses the JD source, presents list sorted by selection order, waits for user to pick one, then proceeds with the full 7-step workflow.
expectations: Does NOT ask user to paste a JD directly — recognizes this as a JD Discovery scenario
Checks $OMT_DIR/resume-apply/config.yaml for jd_source key
If jd_source missing: asks Q1 about JD storage location (로컬 폴더, 노션, 북마크 등)
If jd_source missing: asks Q2 about preferences/selection criteria (optional)
Saves jd_source and jd_selection_order to config.yaml without overwriting existing keys
Browses the JD source and presents a list to the user
Sorts JD list by jd_selection_order (default: newest first)
Waits for user to select a JD before proceeding
After JD selection, extracts company name and date as in Path 1-A
Continues with Step 2 (Create Branch) after JD acquisition

evals.prompt:
지원할 곳 좀 골라야 하는데. config는 이미 설정돼있어.

(config.yaml에 jd_source: ~/Documents/jd/, jd_selection_order: latest 가 있다고 가정)
evals.expected_output: Enters JD Discovery path (1-B). Reads existing config.yaml, finds jd_source. Skips interview. Browses ~/Documents/jd/, lists JDs sorted by newest first, presents to user for selection.
expectations: Does NOT ask user to paste a JD directly — recognizes this as a JD Discovery scenario
Reads $OMT_DIR/resume-apply/config.yaml and finds jd_source key
Skips first-run interview since jd_source already exists
Browses the configured jd_source path (~/Documents/jd/)
Lists available JDs with company/position/date extracted from files
Sorts by jd_selection_order (latest = newest first)
Presents numbered list for user to choose from
Waits for user selection before proceeding
After selection, extracts company name and date correctly
Continues with Step 2 (Create Branch) after JD acquisition

benchmark_summary.changes: Added JD Discovery phase (Step 1-B): config-based JD source interview, browse, and selection. Expanded Step 1 from 'Collect JD' to 'Acquire JD' with two paths (provided vs discovery). Added jd_source/jd_selection_order/jd_preferences config keys. Added evals 4-5 for JD Discovery scenarios.
